name: Bay Scallops with Lemon & Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a heavy large skillet generously with nonstick vegetable spray.
2. Add oleo and melt over medium heat.
3. Add scallops and stir until almost opaque, about 2 minutes.
4. Transfer scallops to a bowl using a slotted spoon.
5. In the same skillet, add vermouth, lemon juice, and lemon peel.
6. Boil until reduced to a thick glaze, about 5 minutes.
7. Add any juices exuded by the scallops and boil until reduced to a glaze.
8. Return scallops to the skillet and stir until coated with sauce.
9. Mix in dill and pepper.
10. Serve immediately.
